title: Camp (canonical entity file)
description: One file per camp property: data/camps/<slug>.json. Registry + history layer only — operational data (sessions, fees, availability) stays in camp-finder. Camp identity is independent of council ownership (camps change hands): 'council' is a versioned attribute; sales/transfers are 'transferred' events, closures 'discontinued' events in data/camps/_events.json. Slugs keep camp-finder's state-prefixed convention (e.g. 'or-camp-meriwether') for painless import.

council.description: Owning/operating council during this window; null = unknown (common for historical camps).

operating_status.description: camp-finder semantics: 'not_operating' = property exists but no program; 'closed' = property gone/sold.

website.description: Authoritative council/camp page during this window.

program_types.description: Open vocabulary; seeded from camp-finder (scouts_bsa_resident, cub_resident, cub_day, high_adventure, webelos).

features.description: Open vocabulary; seeded from camp-finder (dining_hall, waterfront, pool, shooting_sports, climbing, horseback, atv, cope, older_scout_program, high_adventure_option, stem, scuba, mountain_biking).
